voice_group.description: Voice group classification of the male singers (deep to high singing voices).

sibling_sex.description: Sex of the siblings reported by each singer, used to compute sibling sex ratios.

number_of_singers.description: Total number of singers who reported having siblings; relevant because multiple siblings per singer violate the independence assumption of the Chi-squared test.

number_of_siblings.description: Total number of siblings reported across the 195 singers; these are the observational units in the Chi-squared table, but they are not independent because siblings are clustered within singers.
